channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Humana Bolsters CenterWell Primary Care With Another Deal
item.description: Humana’s fast-growing CenterWell healthcare services business added another network of senior primary care centers with the acquisition of Florida-bas...

item.title: When Patients Win, Hospitals Lose
item.description: Hospitals and health systems have been operating with a broken business model for decades. It’s time for a moral reckoning on the subject.

item.title: 7 Quick and Fun 15-Minute Team Building Activities
item.description: Discover 7 quick and fun 15-minute team building activities that will energize your group and foster collaboration. Perfect for busy schedules, these ...

item.title: Effectively Managing Employee Conflict in the Workplace
item.description: Discover effective strategies for managing employee conflict in the workplace. This article explores practical techniques, communication tips, and con...

item.title: What Does a Background Check Consist Of?
item.description: Discover what a background check consists of, including the types of information reviewed, the process involved, and how it affects employment and per...

item.title: Will LLMs Become Obsolete?
item.description: Description: Experts argue LLMs won’t be the end-state: new architectures (multimodal, agentic, beyond transformers) will supersede them.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Tipped For Game-Changing Satellite 5G: No More Dead Zones?
item.description: This year’s iPhones could see a signal boost like no other, with 5G satellite connectivity predicted in the latest report.

item.title: How GLP-1 Weight Loss Drugs Have Revolutionized Obesity- Lessons Learned
item.description: A public health expert explains how GLP-1 drugs have changed the way healthcare providers understand and treat obesity.

item.title: Things that feel risky
item.description: Often aren’t. In fact, they might be the safest way forward.

item.title: Google AI Streamlines App Development with Built-in Cloud Credits
item.description: Discover how Google AI is revolutionizing app development by integrating built-in cloud credits, making it easier and more cost-effective for develope...

item.title: Slack’s Revamped AI-Powered Slackbot Transforms Team Workflows This Winter
item.description: Discover how Slack's revamped AI-powered Slackbot is set to transform team workflows this winter, enhancing collaboration and productivity with innova...

item.title: The next generation of AI businesses
item.description: The first generation was built on large models, demonstrating what could be done and powering many tools. The second generation is focused on reducing...

item.title: Tip for tap
item.description: There is plenty of unintentional harm in our world. We’ve all been bruised or derailed by someone who had no ill intent. We often respond with intenti...

item.title: Time well spent
item.description: What an admirable goal. Perhaps the overriding goal of all goals. How often do we measure this? Do we even know how? Do the systems we’re in push us f...

item.title: A starting point for the blog
item.description: The challenge of the library is the card catalog. If you don’t know what you’re looking for, it’s hard to find much of anything. The challenge of the ...
